mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts ( user_id, title, content, start_date, end_date, max_people, budget ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{maxPeople}, #{budget} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM posts ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT p.id, p.title, p.content, p.start_date, p.end_date, p.max_people, p.budget, p.view_count, p.status, p.created_at, u.user_name FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts p JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.id
AND ( p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
